items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of setting different pricing per location.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario where different pricing is set per location, as indicated in the expected result. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of location-specific pricing. While the linked use case mentions a 10% higher price downtown, it lacks specific evidence to demonstrate that this pricing structure is operational within the system, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
